name: Avant Brands Inc.
description: Avant Brands Inc. is a Canada-based company that focuses on the production of high-quality, handcrafted cannabis products. The company operates a portfolio of licensed cannabis brands, including BLK MKT, Tenzo, Cognōscente, and Treehugger. Avant Brands is dedicated to cultivating premium cannabis in purpose-built indoor facilities, serving both domestic and international markets. Through its subsidiaries, the company manages multiple cultivation and processing facilities across Canada, positioning itself as a leading producer of ultra-premium cannabis.
